ai_business_context: The Spot is a popular neighborhood restaurant with a dining room, bar, patio, and restrooms. Customers scan QR codes or text to report issues about their dining experience — cleanliness, service, food, comfort, and facility problems.
ai_categorization_instructions: Prefer specific categories. When unsure, use `other` and add a short note to internal context.

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: dirty, sticky, smell, trash, spill, grime, sanitize, pests, flies, gnats
issue_categories.description: Cleanliness, sanitation, trash, odors, and pest concerns.
issue_categories.label: Cleanliness & Hygiene

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: broken, leaking, clogged, plumbing, toilet, sink, faucet, door, handle, lock, drain
issue_categories.description: Plumbing, fixtures, doors, and general facility repairs.
issue_categories.label: Maintenance & Repair

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: hot, cold, AC, air conditioning, heater, ventilation, stuffy
issue_categories.description: HVAC, ventilation, temperature comfort, and air quality.
issue_categories.label: HVAC & Ventilation

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: light, lighting, dim, flicker, bulb, dark
issue_categories.label: Lighting

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: service, slow, wait, rude, attentive, host, bartender, server, communication
issue_categories.label: Service Quality

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: safety, hazard, slippery, trip, broken glass, sharp, blocked, emergency
issue_categories.label: Safety Hazard

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: restroom, bathroom, soap, paper towels, toilet paper, hand dryer
issue_categories.label: Restroom Experience

issue_categories.ai_include_keywords: menu, food, taste, cold food, wrong order, allergy, quality, drinks
issue_categories.description: Food quality, accuracy, and menu-related feedback.
issue_categories.label: Food Quality & Order Accuracy

issue_categories.description: Use when unsure; add a short note to internal context.
issue_categories.label: Other

comments.body: Thanks for the reports — restroom checklist updated. Please keep reporting if supplies run low during peak.

issues.description: Women's restroom ran out of paper towels during dinner rush; hand dryer is weak so guests had no good way to dry hands.

reports.body: No paper towels in the women's bathroom around 7:30pm. Had to use napkins from my purse.
Paper towel dispenser was empty and the hand dryer barely works. Pretty gross.

issues.title: Women's restroom out of paper towels

updates.message: Thanks for letting us know! We've restocked the paper towels and made sure there are extras on hand so this doesn't happen again.
Update: we've also fixed the hand dryer — it should be working much better now. Sorry for the inconvenience!

comments.body: We're coaching the host team on quoting accurate waits and doing table touch-backs for delays.

issues.description: Guests reported long waits at the host stand with unclear communication about table timing; some parties were skipped or not updated.

reports.body: Waited ~15 minutes past the quoted time and no one checked in with us. Almost left.
Host seemed overwhelmed — our name got lost and we had to ask twice. Not a great first impression.
Would be great if there was a text notification when our table is ready instead of just standing there.

issues.title: Long waits and unclear communication at host stand

updates.message: We hear you — we're making changes to how we manage wait times so you'll get better updates when you're waiting for a table. Thanks for your patience!

issues.description: Soda station area is sticky with syrup residue; nozzles appear dirty, attracting small gnats.

reports.body: The floor by the soda machine was sticky and my shoes kept catching. Kinda nasty.
Soda nozzles looked crusty and there were a couple tiny flies around it. Didn't feel great filling my drink.

issues.title: Sticky soda station and gnats

updates.message: Thank you for flagging this — we've deep-cleaned the soda station and are now cleaning it more frequently throughout the day. It should be much better on your next visit!

issues.description: Patio door is hard to open/close and sometimes doesn't latch, letting warm air and insects in.

reports.body: Patio door sticks really badly — took two hands to pull it open while holding my drink.
Door didn't close behind the person in front of me and bugs kept coming in. Kinda ruined patio vibes.
We had flies at our table near the patio entrance because the door wasn't closing all the way.

issues.title: Patio door sticking and not latching

updates.message: Thanks for reporting this! We've fixed the patio door — it should open and close smoothly now.
Quick follow-up — we also sealed up the door frame so it latches properly and keeps the bugs out. Enjoy the patio!

issues.description: Dining room feels stuffy and warm during peak hours; airflow seems uneven with hot spots near the center tables.

reports.body: It was noticeably warm inside even though it wasn't that hot outside. My date was uncomfortable.
Air felt stagnant near the middle of the dining room — no breeze at all. We asked to move to the patio.

issues.title: Dining room feels warm and stuffy

updates.message: We're sorry it was uncomfortable! We've got an HVAC specialist coming in to improve the airflow in the dining room. Should be noticeably better soon.

issues.description: Men's restroom toilet intermittently runs and sometimes won't flush fully; handle feels loose.

reports.body: Toilet in the men's room kept running after flushing. Kinda annoying to listen to while washing hands.
Flush handle is loose and you have to jiggle it to stop the water. Feels like it's about to break off.

issues.title: Men's restroom toilet running / loose handle

updates.message: Thanks for the heads up — we've ordered the replacement parts and it should be fully fixed within a few days.

issues.description: A light fixture over window seating flickers and occasionally goes out, making that section feel dim at night.

reports.body: Light above our table by the window kept flickering on and off. Hard to read the menu.
The window-side seating area is way darker than the rest of the restaurant. Not super romantic, just annoying.

issues.title: Flickering light over window seating

updates.message: All fixed! The flickering light has been repaired. Window seating should be nice and well-lit again. Thanks for letting us know!

comments.body: We're re-training expo on allergy callouts and adding a second verification on modified tickets.

issues.description: A modified order was delivered incorrectly (requested no cheese, arrived with cheese). Guest flagged allergy concern and needed a remake.

reports.body: Asked for no cheese due to a dairy allergy and my burger came out with cheese on it. Scary.
Our server handled the remake quickly but please double check allergy mods — could be dangerous.

issues.title: Modified order delivered incorrectly (allergy concern)

updates.message: We take allergies very seriously and we're so sorry this happened. We've added extra checks in our kitchen to make sure allergy requests are handled correctly every time.

issues.description: Music volume in the bar area is too loud; guests have trouble hearing each other and the bartender.

reports.body: Music was so loud at the bar we had to shout to talk. We ended up moving to a table.
Could you turn it down a notch? It's hard to hear the bartender when ordering.

issues.title: Bar music volume too loud

issues.description: Patio trash area gets overfilled on weekends; odors and flies build up.

reports.body: Trash cans by the patio were overflowing and smelled terrible. We moved inside.
Lots of flies around the patio trash area — please empty it more often on weekends!

issues.title: Overflowing patio trash attracting flies

updates.message: You're right — we've added more frequent trash pickups on weekends and upgraded to larger bins with lids. The patio should be much more pleasant now!

issues.description: Entrance mat curls up at one corner creating a trip hazard, especially when the door swings and catches the edge.

reports.body: The mat at the front door is curled up — I almost tripped walking in with my kids.
Door catches the corner of the mat and flips it up. Someone is going to fall.

issues.title: Front entrance mat curled (trip hazard)

issues.description: Server forgot to put in an order; table waited 40 minutes before asking.

reports.body: We waited 40 minutes for our food before flagging down our server. Turns out the order was never put in. Really disappointing.

issues.title: Order never put in — 40 minute wait

issues.description: Burger arrived cold; fries were also lukewarm and soggy.

reports.body: My burger was cold in the middle and the fries were soggy. For $18 I expected better.
Food came out lukewarm — felt like it had been sitting. Otherwise love this place.

issues.title: Cold food — burger and fries came out lukewarm

updates.message: We're sorry your food wasn't up to our standards! We've made changes in the kitchen to make sure plates come out hot and fresh. Hope you'll give us another try.
